name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: First Cash Pawn at 831 E Pioneer Pkwy, Arlington, TX 76010 in the East Arlington neighborhood is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 2.1 stars across 46 reviews. Call +1 817-265-9775.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store chain with a significant footprint across North America and Latin America. The company was built on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through a network of physical retail locations, establishing itself as a publicly traded company listed in both the S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indices. With approximately 22,000 employees, FirstCash has grown into a substantial financial services provider within the alternative lending space.

FirstCash's primary service is non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, meaning borrowers pledge items as collateral and receive cash advances without personal liability beyond losing the pledged item. Beyond lending, the company operates a robust retail business buying and selling jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company also offers layaway services (with 10% down payment), gold/precious metals buying services, and through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive geographic reach with 3,300+ locations across 29 states plus D.C., UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. The scale of their retail inventory and merchandise variety ("we buy almost anything of value") creates a unique hybrid model combining lending with significant retail operations. Their subsidiary AFF's 15,000+ merchant partnerships extends their reach beyond physical pawn locations into lease-to-own consumer finance. The company's public market status and index inclusion reflects institutional validation of its business model.

Pawn loans offer speed and accessibility for credit-constrained consumers without credit checks or employment verification, making them genuinely useful for emergency cash needs. However, pawn loans are inherently expensive relative to traditional lending when the annualized cost is calculated, they require surrender of personal property, and the retail markup on resale of pledged items creates an additional economic burden. FirstCash's scale is an advantage for store access but doesn't fundamentally change the cost structure or risk profile of pawn lending.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador provides exceptional accessibility
No credit check or employment verification required for pawn loans, enabling access for credit-constrained consumers
Immediate cash-on-the-spot payments for items sold and fast pawn loan funding
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability beyond losing the pledged item
Diverse merchandise inventory (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments) creates retail shopping options
Layaway service with affordable 10% down payment provides alternative to credit for purchase financing
Subsidiary AFF operates 15,000+ retail merchant partnerships for lease-to-own and finance solutions
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing corporate stability and transparency
cons: Pawn loans carry high implicit interest rates when annualized, making them expensive relative to traditional lending
Requires surrender of personal property as collateral with risk of permanent loss if loan not repaid
Retail markups on resold pledged items create additional economic burden beyond loan interest
Limited transparency on website regarding specific interest rates, terms, fees, and loan terms by location
Pawn model incentivizes default through merchandise resale rather than repayment, creating perverse economics
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash ($100-$5,000) with no credit check within 24-48 hours
Individuals with poor/no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or payday loans
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments, tools) willing to temporarily surrender property
Bargain hunters seeking discounted retail merchandise from resold or unclaimed pawn items
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers experiencing genuine financial emergencies who have valuable items to pledge and cannot access traditional credit, offering fast cash without credit checks. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are fundamentally expensive financing when costs are annualized, and the non-recourse structure means borrowers risk permanent loss of property; this should be a last resort, not a primary lending source.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Cash purchases of jewelry and precious metals (gold, silver, platinum)
Retail sales of pawn merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Item valuation and on-the-spot cash payments
Lease-to-own financing through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
Retail finance payment solutions through AFF
Store locator and inventory search tools
Multi-location liquidity for customers across geographic footprint
Alternative collateral-based financing without credit bureau reporting
